name: First Tray Marbling Kit
short_description: A guided first setup with tray, sizing, alum, comb, droppers, and cotton test sheets.
description: Everything a new marbler needs to pull the first clean print without chasing supplies across multiple catalogs.

name: Bookbinder Endpaper Kit
short_description: Coordinated pigments, alum, cotton sheets, and edition cards for custom endpapers.
description: Built for binders planning covers, case bindings, journals, and small edition work.

name: Classroom Safe Marbling Kit
short_description: Low-mess tools, shared color cups, gloves, and simple chemistry notes for group sessions.
description: Designed for art teachers and workshop hosts who need repeatable results and fast cleanup.

name: Carrageenan Sizing Powder
short_description: Measured powder for building a smooth floating bath.
description: A replenishable studio staple packed with clear mixing ratios and batch notes.

name: Alum Prep Solution
short_description: Paper mordant for stronger pigment transfer on cotton sheets and card blanks.
description: Use before printing to help marbled colors grip evenly across absorbent surfaces.

name: pH Strip and Scoop Set
short_description: Test strips, measuring scoops, and a laminated bench card for consistent chemistry.
description: Small tools that keep sizing batches predictable from one studio day to the next.

name: Storm Garden Pigment Set
short_description: Five botanical greens, blues, and smoky violets for organic comb patterns.
description: A moody color story for endpapers, envelopes, wrapping sheets, and art prints.

name: Madder and Brass Accent Set
short_description: Warm red, ochre, brass, and umber accents for historical paper palettes.
description: Adds bookish warmth to classic stone, bouquet, and nonpareil patterns.

name: Test Swatch Paper Pack
short_description: Pre-cut strips for testing color spread, bath strength, and pigment balance.
description: Keep a visible record before committing full sheets to the tray.

name: Maple Comb Pair
short_description: Two spacing combs for nonpareil lines, feathering, and controlled pulls.
description: Comfortable wood-handled combs sized for common studio trays.

name: Adjustable Pattern Rake
short_description: A sliding-pin rake for waves, chevrons, and wide repeat structures.
description: Tune the spacing for stationery runs, endpaper editions, and workshop demonstrations.

name: Drying Line Clip Set
short_description: Waxed line, stainless clips, and labels for organizing wet prints.
description: Turns a small room into a tidy drying station without mixing up editions.

name: Cotton Sheet Studio Pack
short_description: Twenty absorbent cotton sheets cut for tray work and bookbinding use.
description: A reliable surface for crisp pulls, deep color, and easy trimming.

name: Card Blank and Envelope Bundle
short_description: Folded cards, envelopes, and note slips for weekend stationery projects.
description: Make small giftable sets from the same bath before the color story changes.

name: Pattern Archive Logbook
short_description: A ring-bound log for bath recipes, pigment notes, and edition samples.
description: Track what worked so favorite patterns can be repeated later.
